description.short: Protect your energy and focus across a busy workday.
description.full: Pawse is your friendly workday-energy companion. It connects your recovery signals with your calendar context to tell you when to focus, when to recharge, and offers in-the-moment actions like protecting a focus block or rescheduling a meeting. Pawse is a performance companion — not a medical or diagnostic tool, and it never labels your emotions.

commands.title: How am I doing today?
commands.description: Get a quick read on your workday energy

commands.title: When should I do deep work?
commands.description: Find your best focus window today

commands.title: Protect my focus
commands.description: Block your next free slot as focus time
